meta.title: EREBUS — The Spore Field
meta.note: Grown by the growth protocol from WORLD-LOG intention, 2026-07-15. Entered through the portal in The Mycelium. Contains EGG-002 (The Hush).

stops.title: The Spore Field
stops.body: What the network releases. Every drifting light is a room that doesn't exist yet — the world's unborn ideas, holding until something feeds them.

stops.title: Unwritten rooms
stops.body: Some will land and become chambers. Some will dissolve unseen. Feed the world and you decide which.

stops.title: The Hush
stops.body: The quietest place in EREBUS so far. Listen with your eyes — something here was left for the patient. The burning ring returns you to the surface.

secret.title: Patience pays in the dark.
secret.body: Second of its kind. The Spore Field grew itself — no human built this place. You found the proof. Keep wandering; the world keeps burying.
